source: 4. Zero-shot transfer across 93 languages - Open-sourcing enhanced LASER library.pdf

concepts.finding: LASER embeds sentences from 93 languages in a single shared space, achieving zero-shot cross-lingual transfer: models trained on English data can predict for 90+ languages without adaptation.
concepts.implication: Massively multilingual sentence encoders enable language-agnostic query understanding with a single model handling queries in 90+ languages.
concepts.open_question: Does LASER-style multilingual training generalize to query-level (short text) understanding as well as sentence-level tasks?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A LASER-trained multilingual encoder will achieve zero-shot query intent classification within 10% F1 of per-language supervised models for 50+ languages.

concepts.finding: LASER sets new SOTA on zero-shot cross-lingual NLI for 13/14 languages in XNLI and achieves strong results on multilingual similarity search.
concepts.implication: Shared multilingual embedding spaces can be evaluated on zero-shot transfer tasks, providing a framework for evaluating query embedding quality across languages.
concepts.open_question: What is the practical upper bound of zero-shot cross-lingual query understanding vs. few-shot adaptation?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Zero-shot cross-lingual query intent classification using LASER will achieve >80% of the accuracy of few-shot (100 examples per language) baselines across 20 languages.
